name: Python 3.11
updateContentCommand: if [ -f packages.txt ]; then sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y < packages.txt; fi; if ! command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh; fi; UV_BIN=$(command -v uv || echo "$HOME/.local/bin/uv"); UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$HOME/.venvs/blank-app-template" "$UV_BIN" sync

postAttachCommand.server: UV_BIN=$(command -v uv || echo "$HOME/.local/bin/uv"); UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$HOME/.venvs/blank-app-template" "$UV_BIN" run streamlit run streamlit_app.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
